name: Kolio Fourno (Baked Mackerel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the fish.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Place in a pan and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Sprinkle garlic over the fish.
5. Sprinkle onion, parsley, and green pepper over the fish.
6. Pour oil over all.
7. Add tomatoes.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 250°F for 15 minutes.
9. Add wine.
10. Baste the fish with pan sauce.
11. Continue baking for an additional 30 minutes, or until most of the liquid is absorbed.
